# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "servicePrincipalName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the service principal"
      },
      "minLength": 1,
      "maxLength": 120
    },
    "resourceGroupScope": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Resource group name to scope permissions (least privilege)"
      },
      "minLength": 1,
      "maxLength": 90
    },
    "allowedResourceTypes": {
      "type": "array",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Explicit allowlist of resource types that can be deployed"
      },
      "defaultValue": [
        "Microsoft.Web/sites",
        "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
        "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
        "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
        "Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries"
      ]
    },
    "roleDefinitionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Role definition ID - use Reader or custom role instead of Contributor"
      },
      "defaultValue": "acdd72a7-3385-48ef-bd42-f606fba81ae7",
      "allowedValues": [
        "acdd72a7-3385-48ef-bd42-f606fba81ae7",
        "b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c",
        "8e3af657-a8ff-443c-a75c-2fe8c4bcb635"
      ]
    },
    "enableManagedIdentity": {
      "type": "bool",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Use managed identity instead of service principal for enhanced security"
      },
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Key Vault name to store service principal credentials securely"
      },
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24
    },
    "deploymentEnvironment": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Environment tag for conditional access policies"
      },
      "allowedValues": [
        "Development",
        "Staging",
        "Production"
      ]
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "subscriptionId": "[subscription().subscriptionId]",
    "resourceGroupId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups', parameters('resourceGroupScope'))]",
    "roleAssignmentName": "[guid(parameters('resourceGroupScope'), parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]",
    "customRoleName": "[concat('CICD-Limited-Deployer-', uniqueString(parameters('resourceGroupScope')))]",
    "keyVaultSecretName": "cicd-sp-credentials"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[guid(variables('customRoleName'))]",
      "properties": {
        "roleName": "[variables('customRoleName')]",
        "description": "Custom role with least privilege for CI/CD deployments - scoped to specific resource types",
        "type": "CustomRole",
        "permissions": [
          {
            "actions": [
              "Microsoft.Resources/subscriptions/resourceGroups/read",
              "Microsoft.Resources/deployments/*"
            ],
            "notActions": [
              "Microsoft.Authorization/*/Delete",
              "Microsoft.Authorization/*/Write",
              "Microsoft.Authorization/elevateAccess/Action"
            ],
            "dataActions": [],
            "notDataActions": []
          }
        ],
        "assignableScopes": [
          "[variables('resourceGroupId')]"
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-02-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "standard"
        },
        "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
        "enableRbacAuthorization": true,
        "enableSoftDelete": true,
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": 90,
        "enablePurgeProtection": true,
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Deny",
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "ipRules": [],
          "virtualNetworkRules": []
        },
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Disabled"
      },
      "tags": {
        "Purpose": "SecureCredentialStorage",
        "Environment": "[parameters('deploymentEnvironment')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-31",
      "name": "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "condition": "[parameters('enableManagedIdentity')]",
      "tags": {
        "Purpose": "CICD-Automation",
        "Environment": "[parameters('deploymentEnvironment')]",
        "ManagedBy": "ARM-Template"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[variables('roleAssignmentName')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('servicePrincipalName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', guid(variables('customRoleName')))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', guid(variables('customRoleName')))]",
        "principalId": "[if(parameters('enableManagedIdentity'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('servicePrincipalName'))).principalId, '')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal",
        "scope": "[variables('resourceGroupId')]",
        "description": "Least privilege role assignment for CI/CD pipeline - scoped to resource group only"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "managedIdentityPrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[if(parameters('enableManagedIdentity'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('servicePrincipalName'))).principalId, 'N/A')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Principal ID of the managed identity - use this in pipeline configuration"
      }
    },
    "managedIdentityClientId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[if(parameters('enableManagedIdentity'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', parameters('servicePrincipalName'))).clientId, 'N/A')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Client ID of the managed identity"
      }
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Key Vault URI for secure credential retrieval"
      }
    },
    "scopedResourceGroup": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('resourceGroupScope')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Resource group where permissions are scoped"
      }
    }
  }
}
